role: This directory contains the foundational documentation and templates for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining its purpose, configuration, and architectural contracts.
responsibility: Collectively, these documents define the ArchSpine system's purpose, configuration parameters, mirroring templates, and architectural contracts to enable a mirrored documentation annotation system.

children.role: Primary project documentation for ArchSpine, a mirror system for architectural documentation and governance

This document defines the ArchSpine project: a mirror-based documentation annotation system that creates and maintains a parallel .spine directory for architecture documentation aligned with source code.
Template for defining the architectural purpose, responsibilities, and boundaries of a file or module within the ArchSpine documentation mirror system.
Document describing the system vision and module orchestration of the ArchSpine mirror system
Architectural contract definition for a project component in the ArchSpine mirror system.
